title: Acadia Pharmaceuticals Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Reaffirms 2026 Financial Guidance
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals reports Q1 2026 financial results and reaffirms full-year 2026 guidance. The company reported Q1 2026 total revenues of $268.06 million, up 9.72% year-over-year. GAAP earnings per share of $0.02 missed analyst expectations. The company reaffirms 2026 guidance with total revenues expected between $1.22 billion and $1.28 billion. NUPLAZID net product sales are expected between $760 million and $790 million. DAYBUE net product sales are expected between $460 million and $490 million. The company maintains confidence in achieving these targets despite near-term profitability headwinds from commercial expansion investments. Phase 2 remlifanserin topline data in Alzheimer's disease psychosis is expected between August and October 2026. The company has expanded its sales and marketing infrastructure to capture market opportunities.
